queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between checking account status with no checking account and reduced credit default probability.
Determinants of credit risk associated with loan duration in months and its contribution to decreased default likelihood.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Statistical impact of credit history involving critical accounts or other existing credits on the mitigation of credit risk.
